title.en: The Lord of the Boundless gave Ye Tian many sec...

content.en:
Soon.

The Lord of the Boundless gave Ye Tian many secrets and a map.

"Lord of Endless, I told you before that the End of the Realm and the Ten Directions Black Domains all belong to one Primordial Domain, and the Primordial Black Sea is the end of time and space for many Primordial Domains. The original domain is also divided into levels, and there are three levels: the primary original domain, the intermediate original domain, and the advanced original domain. Strictly speaking, the original domain where we are located can be called the deep sea original domain, which is not bad among the primary original domains. Some of the weaker primary primordial realms may only have a pseudo-progenitor, not even a single primordial ancestor, or only a few progenitors. And in any medium primordial domain, there are more than 100 Triple Primordial Ancestors alone, and most of them have a Quadruple Primordial Ancestor. "

"What about the Higher Plains?"

Ye Tian asked casually.

"The High Origin Domain, even the Origin Ancestor doesn't know how many, it's hard to count, only by becoming a Quadruple Origin Ancestor can you become a party overlord, and the Fivefold Origin Ancestor is the real top powerhouse. The map I gave you recorded the information of a higher primordial domain—the Upper Spirit Primordial Domain. "

The Unbounded Lord's Way.

Ye Tian glanced at the map, and the Extreme Dao will was integrated into it, and a lot of information was integrated into his will, which he browsed and accepted one by one.

This information includes the positioning coordinates of more than a dozen intermediate primordial domains, as well as the positioning coordinates of the upper spirit primordial domains of higher primordial domains.

If there are no positioning coordinates, then I don't know how many years it will take to travel through the Primordial Black Sea to be lucky enough to perceive the space-time fluctuations of a primordial domain, so as to find that primordial domain.

"Endless Lord, remember, even if you go to other original domains, don't expose the location coordinates of your original domain, and don't be tracked by other strong people, you must spare more places and come back, otherwise once our location here is exposed, maybe we will be enslaved by some forces. After all, the Primary Origin Domain was too weak to resist any of the major forces in the Advanced Origin Domain at all. The Unbounded Lord reminded.

"Lord of the Unbounded, I understand!"

Ye Tian nodded.

And among the many information materials given by the Lord of the Unbounded are also information about the Upper Spirit Primordial Domain, as well as other information about the Middle Primordial Domain.

Not only that, but there are also many secret materials and many secret stories and so on.

It can be said that this information can save Ye Tiantian many detours in the future.

More importantly, he can go to the Higher Origin Realm to develop, which is the most important thing.

Of course, he won't go now, and after his strength has improved a lot, he will consider going to that High Origin Domain.

"Lord of the Boundless, give you this Nine Extremes Golden Lotus!"

Ye Tian moved the Nine Extremes Golden Lotus with the power of the Extreme Extreme Dao, and was caught by the Lord of the Boundless with the power of the Extreme Extreme.

At this time, Ye Tiancai asked, "Lord of the Unbounded, can you talk about the effect of the Nine Extremes Golden Lotus now?"

The Unbounded Lord put away the Nine Extremes Golden Lotus, and then revealed, "Okay, I'll just say it, but you don't want to snatch it back." The Nine Extremes Golden Lotus has a total of eighteen petals and nine lotus seeds, among which the lotus seeds can heal the cracks in the Pagoda of Will. I failed to inscribe the Extreme Path before, and the Pagoda of Will cracked, so I need Lotus Seed to repair the Pagoda of Will. And the petals can allow the Triple Ancestor to comprehend the Extreme Path. Of course, it depends on luck how many extreme extremes you can comprehend. However, if you can cultivate to the existence of the Triple Ancestor, your comprehension will not be too bad, and you can almost comprehend one or two extreme extreme paths. I told you before that if you want to become a Fourfold Ancestor, one of the conditions is to engrave the Nine Extreme Extremes on the Pagoda of Will. However, how difficult it is to comprehend the Extreme Extreme Path, some Triple Primordial Ancestors have comprehended the Eight Extreme Paths, and they will no longer be able to comprehend the Ninth Extreme Path. In such a situation, the Nine Extremes Golden Lotus can play a huge role. "

"I see!" Ye Tian understood, "Lord of the Unbounded, in this way, I am at a loss!"

The Lord of the Unbounded smiled and said, "Lord of Endless, you have not lost anything, I told you about that treasure land, and you should have obtained other resources." Furthermore, if I don't give the coordinates of those middle and high origin domains, if you are unlucky, I am afraid that you will be trapped in this area of the end of the realm forever. "

Of course, he only used one piece of information in exchange for the Nine Extremes Golden Lotus, and he naturally made more money.

"Lord of the Boundary, I won't snatch the Nine Extremes Golden Lotus, this cooperation will end here!"

Ye Tian took his leave.

Then, Ye Tian left.

And with a wave of his hand, the Unbounded Lord made this dojo begin to escape, constantly shuttling in the primordial Black Sea.

In the future, Ye Tian will never be able to find this place again.

"Hahaha, Nine Extremes Golden Lotus, with this treasure, I can not only repair the damage of the Will Pagoda, but also comprehend at least two extreme poles. In the future, I also have a glimmer of hope to become a fourfold ancestor!"

The Unbounded Lord said excitedly.

Before, he couldn't see a glimmer of hope, but now he has this glimmer of hope.

Don't underestimate this glimmer of hope, even if it is in the high level of the original ancestor, I don't know how many triple primordial ancestors will never be able to get a glimpse of this glimmer of hope, and they can only stay in the triple primordial ancestor forever.

......

"Next, comprehend other black words, and engrave some more black words on the Pagoda of Will, although it is enough to engrave the nine extreme poles, but the true Triple Ancestor of the Heavens, it is impossible to only engrave the nine extreme poles on the Pagoda of Will. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So in the years that followed, he tried his best to comprehend the black text.

Fortunately, he has more extreme ancestral endowments, and there are many extreme extreme ways to comprehend, so it is not difficult to spend some more years and understand the black characters.

For the other Triple Ancestors, comprehending the Extreme Extreme Dao was the most difficult, but this step was very simple for Ye Tian.

A long time passed, and Ye Tian understood one black text after another.

And his will pagoda is also inscribed with a black text on a layer, representing a kind of extreme extreme.

After hundreds of billions of eternal years had passed, Ye Tian had finally comprehended the thirty-two black characters, but since his Pagoda of Will only had twenty-nine floors, he had only engraved twenty-nine black characters.

A twenty-nine-story Pagoda of Will contained twenty-nine Extreme Paths, and if the Unbounded Lord knew about it, he would be absolutely dumbfounded.

And at this time, Ye Tian's strength didn't know how much he had improved, and he could blow up his previous self with one hand.

"I'm too strong now, but unfortunately I don't have enough resources, and the improvement of the Extreme Dao's will is slow, otherwise I can continue to engrave black characters!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He felt that it was time for him to go to the Upper Spirit Origin Domain and send a copy body over to investigate the situation.

And there may be a lot of Extreme Dao Ancestors over there, and you can also copy more of them when the time comes, and increase your own heritage.
